BLOG

Why Food-Grade Lubricants Are Essential in Food & Beverage Production?

6 min read | 23 August 2024

Proper lubrication is essential in any manufacturing process to ensure smooth and efficient operations. However, in the food and beverage industry, there’s an added layer of responsibility: ensuring that the lubricants used do not compromise food safety. To strike this balance, food-grade lubricants are specifically designed to minimize the risk of contamination while maintaining machinery performance. These lubricants are formulated using base stocks and additives that are safe for use in food processing environments, adhering to stringent regulations set by agencies like the National Sanitation Foundation (NSF) International.

NSF certification is recognized globally as a standard for safety in food and beverage production. Products that carry the NSF mark are trusted by companies worldwide, as they meet rigorous food safety standards established by global regulatory bodies.

Understanding NSF Compliance Programs for Food-Grade Lubricants

The quality and purity of lubricants in food production are paramount. NSF's compliance programs, which are based on the USDA White Book, classify lubricants into categories that indicate the level of contact they can have with food and the associated risks. These categories include:

3H Lubricants:These are direct-contact lubricants, formulated with base stocks approved by the United States Pharmacopeia (USP) and National Formulary (NF). They are used where direct food contact is unavoidable.

H1 Lubricants: These lubricants are formulated with HX-1 approved additives and are intended for incidental food contact.

H2 Lubricants: Used in areas where there is no risk of food contact, these lubricants are safe for machinery but must not come into contact with food products.

H3 Lubricants: These are soluble oils used for cleaning and preventing rust on equipment during storage. These must be fully removed before the equipment is used for food processing.

NSF also certifies products that meet ISO 21469 standards, which take food safety a step further by ensuring not only safe formulations but also quality control and risk management procedures in manufacturing.

Incorporating Food-Grade Lubricants into Your HACCP System

Using food-grade lubricants is an integral part of a plant's Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (HACCP) system, a science-based approach to identifying and controlling food safety hazards. An effective HACCP plan, built on seven core principles, helps prevent contamination at every stage of production. These principles include:

Hazard Analysis

Identification of Critical Control Points (CCPs)

Establishing Critical Limits

Monitoring Procedures

Corrective Actions

Verification Procedures

Record-Keeping and Documentation

Many facilities also adopt color-coding systems within their HACCP plans to reduce the risk of product mix-ups, particularly in diverse and multilingual work environments.

Applications of Food-Grade Lubricants

3H Lubricants: These are used in direct-contact scenarios such as release agents on baking pans, dough dividers, slicers, and other equipment. They are also applied to products like eggs, fruits, and vegetables, and serve as a protective layer for wine and vinegar against air exposure.

H1 Lubricants: These lubricants perform essential functions like rust and corrosion prevention while complying with food safety regulations. Commonly used in hydraulic fluids, greases, and gear oils, H1 lubricants ensure that machinery operates efficiently without compromising food safety.

Best Practices for Storage and Handling of Food-Grade Lubricants

Proper storage and handling are crucial to preventing cross-contamination. Always store food-grade lubricants separately from non-food-grade lubricants in a cool, dry environment. Ensure that lubricants are clearly labeled and that safety data sheets are readily accessible to support correct usage. Designating specific containers and applicators for food-grade lubricants further minimizes contamination risks.

Thus, understanding the importance of food-grade lubricants, their proper use, and how they fit into your HACCP plan is essential for maintaining both food safety and production efficiency. By using NSF-certified lubricants and following best practices for storage and handling, you can significantly reduce the risk of contamination while ensuring your machinery runs smoothly.

Explore our Food Grade Lubricants

pages.text:
BLOG

The Growing Appeal of Synthetic Greases in Industrial Applications

5 min read | 28 Feb 2025

In recent years, synthetic greases have gained significant traction in industrial and automotive applications. Initially favored for extreme conditions involving high temperatures, heavy loads, and high-speed operations, synthetic greases are now being adopted for medium-duty applications due to advancements in formulations and cost efficiency.

Why Synthetic Greases Are Gaining Popularity

Two key factors have contributed to the increased adoption of synthetic greases: enhanced formulations and improved affordability. Manufacturers have developed synthetic greases in various viscosities and consistencies, including eco-friendly and biodegradable options. These advancements enable maintenance professionals to apply synthetic greases in a broader range of industrial settings.

Understanding Grease Composition

Grease is primarily composed of a base oil, a thickener, and performance-enhancing additives. The thickener provides structure, allowing the lubricant to stay in place and release oil as needed. Mineral and synthetic greases often use metallic-based thickeners like Lithium, Aluminium, Barium, Sodium, or Calcium, but synthetic greases employ synthetic base oils, such as PAO, PAG, Silicones, or Esters, which offer superior stability under extreme conditions.

Synthetic vs. Mineral-Based Greases

While mineral-based greases remain dominant in industrial applications, synthetic alternatives offer significant advantages in specific conditions:

High-Temperature Resistance: Mineral greases soften at around 140°C (285°F), potentially leading to leakage and component failure. Synthetic greases maintain stability at higher temperatures, making them ideal for automotive engines, manufacturing equipment, and heavy industrial applications.

Low-Temperature Performance: In cold environments, mineral greases can become stiff, increasing startup torque and potentially leading to bearing failure. Synthetic greases retain their fluidity in sub-zero temperatures, ensuring smooth equipment operation in industries like aerospace and refrigeration.

High-Speed Operations: Industrial fans, machine tool spindles, and high-speed bearings benefit from synthetic greases due to their ability to reduce friction and noise while providing consistent lubrication at elevated rotational speeds.

Outdoor and Harsh Environments: Synthetic greases are formulated to resist moisture, dust, and contaminants, making them the preferred choice for amusement parks, construction equipment, and mining operations.

Centralized Lubrication Systems: Synthetic greases are now available in NLGI 1 and NLGI 0 grades, offering better flow properties for automated lubrication systems in industrial plants.

Compatibility and Transition Considerations

When switching from mineral to synthetic greases, compatibility is a critical factor. Mixing different grease types can result in a change in consistency, potentially leading to lubrication failure. It is advisable to fully purge old grease from machinery and lubrication systems before introducing synthetic alternatives.

Additionally, facilities using centralized lubrication systems should assess flow rate differences between conventional and synthetic greases. In some cases, system adjustments, such as increased pump pressure, may be necessary to ensure optimal grease distribution.

The Future of Synthetic Greases

As industries continue to prioritize efficiency, reliability, and sustainability, synthetic greases will play an increasingly vital role in equipment maintenance. With improved affordability, wider application potential, and superior performance characteristics, synthetic greases are no longer just an option for extreme conditions but a strategic choice for modern lubrication solutions.

By integrating synthetic greases into maintenance practices, industries can enhance equipment longevity, reduce downtime, and optimize overall operational efficiency, making them a smart investment for the future.

CLIENT STORY

An innovative, water based eco-friendly solution with Molygraph Smoothform Aqua FS 7000.

2 min read | 05 June 2023

Overview

A major wheels forming manufacturer was using an oil based forming lubricant for aluminum wheel forming. Oil based lubricants have inherent problems of cleaning as well as hand and skin irritation due to the additives used in them.

The manufacturer wanted to use an environment friendly product with a similar performance to the current oil based lubricant in use as well as improved cleaning properties.

Challenge

Replacing oil based lubricant by a water based fluid.

Improved cleaning properties to make painting on surface easier.

Solution

MOLYGRAPH SMOOTHFORM AQUA FS 7000

Water based synthetic forming fluid

Specially designed for ferrous and non-ferrous surfaces.

Fortified with extreme pressure and anti-wear additives.

Superb boundary lubrication performance during metal forming operations.

Resists corrosion to steel and aluminum surfaces.

Benefits of Molygraph Smoothform Aqua FS 7000

.

..

Technical Specifications

Competitor Product

Smoothform Aqua FS 7000

Molygraph Advantage

Chemistry

Oil Based

Water based

Superior film forming ability

Dilution

Neat

1:2

Better performance under heavy loads

Results

Trials were taken on a 300 ton press with aluminium sheet thickness between 3.3 mm. The drawing depth was 50 mm and dilution ratio was kept at 1:3 of concentrate with water. Following was observed during the trials:

Smooth formation of the parts without any surface defects.

No serrations or chip off of corners.

Oil easily removed for painting and does not hamper the final painting process.

Consumption per component the same as existing product.

No corrosion found on parts in short term process storage.

Does not hamper subsequent painting process

Related Product

Smoothform Aqua FS 7000

Water-based synthetic forming fluid.

CLIENT STORY

An increased price to performance ratio with a cost saving of 15% with Molygraph Smoothform 2900 TD

1 min read | 06 June 2023

Overview

A major wheels manufacturer in India was looking at a cost effective

solution for their lubrication requirements in their wheel forming

process. They had been using a competitor product for the last 18 years

and required cost savings with similar or better performance.

With expertise in custom formulation, Molygraph specially developed a

product for this particular application. This was especially challenging as

the customer was using a heritage product since a long time and was

expecting a better price to performance ratio in a short span of time.

Challenge

Increased price to performance ratio.

Solution

MOLYGRAPH SMOOTHFORM 2900 TD

Premium grade heavy duty drawing oil

Specifically formulated for tube drawing and pilgering application.

Fortified with extreme pressure and anti-wear additives.

Superb boundary lubrication performance during metal forming operations.

Resists corrosion to steel and aluminum surfaces.

Benefits of Molygraph Smoothform 2900 TD

COMPETITOR PRODUCT

Results

Trials were taken on a 500 ton press with aluminium sheet thickness between 2.3-6 mm. The drawing depth was 100 mm. Following was observed during the trials:

Smooth formation of the parts without any surface defects.

No skin irritation during long term usage of the product.

No corrosion during long term storage, even during the monsoon season.

Easy cleanability of the oil so as to not interfere with the subsequent painting process.

Overall savings of 15% over existing lubricant used

CLIENT STORY

A 24% improvement in die life and resulting in higher productivity

1 min read | 23 November 2022

Overview

Forging Lubricants play a very critical role in the daily production of forged parts in the forging industry. The hot forging process takes place at extreme temperatures and under adverse conditions. The major benchmarks for a good forging lubricant are die life, efficient die cooling, and smooth release of the components without any surface defects. This makes a good forging lubricant indispensable for the smooth and efficient day-to-day production of forged parts.

A global manufacturer of automotive components reached out to Molygraph to provide an improvement against the current forging lubricant used in their manufacturing plant in India.

Challenge

Need an increase in performance and die life.

The lubricant has to be cost-effective.

Component Specifications

Name

Weight/kg

Drive Shaft #4193

2.2 kg

Body Part #4082

3.6 kg

Cam Shaft

6.4 kg

Connecting Rod

2.7 kg

Solution

MOLYGRAPH GRAPHOL GFL ULTRA 300

Custom Graphite particle size.

Wettable temperatures exceeding 350°C.

Excellent resistance to settling of the graphite particles.

Technical Specifications

Competitor Product

Graphol GFL Ultra 300

Test Method

Molygraph Advantage

Mean particle size

3 um

2 um

Malvern Masterzizer

Customized lower particle size gives a significant increase in performance

Settling Test (24 hrs)

Hard Settling

Soft Settling

ASTM D 445

Greater stability of the lubricant under standing conditions

Result

Running on a dilution ratio of 1:13 to 1:14, the following observations were made. A total of 13,229 parts were forged.

Smooth release.

No surface defects such as underfilling or pitting.

Excellent die-cooling curves.

Die life increases from an average of 2500 parts per die to 3100 parts per die.

Related Product

Graphol GFL Ultra 300

New generation ultrafine synthetic graphite-based hot forging lubricant.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/molygraph-mfg-460---ep-eliminated-bearing-failure-maintenance-down-time--with-a-cost-saving-of-inr-800-000-per-year-
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph MFG 460 / EP eliminated bearing failure maintenance down time, with a cost saving of INR 800,000 per year.

2 min read | 05 June 2023

Overview

Pellet mills in the animal feed industry operate in very harsh conditions. Line choking and grease blockage are common phenomena during lubrication of the pellet mills. This in turn results in inadequate lubrication and leads to bearing failure. One of the leading animal feed manufacturer in India was facing exactly the same problem where bearings failed after 7000-8000 tons of production leading to expensive maintenance and production downtime costs.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Our analysis was that the poor pumpability of the existing grease as well as the issue of grease residue remaining in the lubrication line led to poor supply of grease to the bearings. The pumpability is critical here as the grease has to travel 4-5 meters to reach the bearings which are operating under high temperature

Challenge

Can the lubricant prevent line choking and blocking and thus prevent wear and tear of the bearings?

The lubricant has to be cost effective.

Solution

MOLYGRAPH MFG 460 / EP

Lithium Complex grease fortified with EP additives and rust inhibited.

Excellent EP properties.

High pumpability.

Wide Temperature capability 10 to 150 degrees.

Benefits of Molygraph MFG 460 EP

.

Technical Specifications

Competitor Product

Test Method

Higher load carrying capacity

Results

On switching to Molygraph on extended trials of more than a 100 days, it was observed by the customer that the bearings failures stopped, and abnormal maintenance downtime was eliminated. The die and roller change happened at 16,000 tons, in line with the machine manufacturers recommendation.

INR 800,000 indirect cost savings per year in terms of reduction in maintenance downtime and bearing failures

pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph MFG 220 Plus reduced premature bearing failure, with a 50% reduction in grease consumption.

1 min read | 05 June 2023

Overview

Bearings in cold rolling mills are subjected to harsh environmental conditions. Heavy loads, high temperature and dust and water ingress are a common phenomena. Using a conventional EP 2 grease can cause severe problems such as premature bearing failure, grease thinning and running out and frequent maintenance and downtimes which directly affect productivity.

A reputed manufacturer of stainless steel strips was faced with all of the above problems and asked Molygraph to provide a solution.

Challenge

Increase relubrication intervals.

Elimination of premature bearing failures.

Solution

MOLYGRAPH MFG 220 PLUS

High load and Anti-Wear properties.

Excellent resistance to thermal and oxidative degradation.

Superior resistance to water washout and spray-off.

Benefits of Molygraph MFG 220 Plus

.

Technical Specifications

Competitor Product

Molygraph MFG 220 Plus

Test Method

Molygraph Advantage

Thickener type

Lithium

Lithium Complex

Superior thickener system providing all round performance

Four ball weld load

250

400

ASTM D-2596

Ability to withstand high loads

Water washout % loss

8

2

ASTM D-1264

Upto 4x increase in water resistance

Dropping Point (ºC)

180

265

ASTM D-566

Higher dropping point shows a greater ability to withstand high temperatures

Result

In total 8 bearings were lubricated with Molygraph MFG 220 Plus with an initial fill of 20 kg. MFG 220 Plus was tested against their current grease running side by side on two machines. Observations were as follows

After 30 days current grease had totally dried up and wear debris were clearly visible.

With continuous running for 30 days MFG 220 Plus was still in good condition and no wear debris were visible.

Elimination of oil based rust preventive without any additional process

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/animal-feed-manufacturer-switches-to-molygraph-sgh-220-plus-grease--solving-pumpability-load-carrying-issues-and-saving-23-annually--
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Animal Feed manufacturer switches to Molygraph SGH 220 Plus Grease, solving pumpability & load-carrying issues and saving 23% annually.

3 min read | 17 May 2023

Overview

The critical bearings of Pellet mills & Hammer mills in the animal feed industry operate under harsh conditions at high speeds and heavy loads. A leading animal feed manufacturer in north India was facing the problem of grease thinning and thus frequent relubrication.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Our application experts found that the low pumpability & poor load carrying capacity of the existing grease was the major issue. They recommended Molygraph’s SGH 220 Plus grease which solved the problem.

Challenge

A customer has a Pellet mill that has 8 bearings operating at around 70°C while rotating at 1000 RPM and a Hammer mill with 2 bearings operating at around 90°C rotating at 3000 RPM.

The grease being used earlier in the bearings was thinning out at working parameters so the customer had to relubricate frequently.

Grease residue remaining in the lubrication line led to a poor supply of grease to the bearings.

This led to a loss of production time and excessive consumption of grease. Also a potential threat to the operating life of expensive bearings.

Solution

SGH 220 PLUS

Multifunctional Extreme Pressure High Load Water Resistant Grease

Long-life grease for various applications.

High-quality lubricating grease with good shear stability.

Guards against rust and corrosion.

Excellent water resistance properties

Performance comparison with incumbent grease:

PROPERTY

DESCRIPTION

CONVENTIONAL GREASE

Molygraph SGH 220 plus

REMARKS

Stability

Roll Stability

8-10%

<5 %

A lower number is better

Product specifications:

SGH 220 PLUS

Multifunctional Extreme Pressure High Load Water Resistant Grease

Base Oil: Mineral

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 320 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -20 to +200°C

Packaging: 1 Kg | 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

The customer did the test run on all 10 bearings for a month and found that the grease was not thinning out.

Re-lubrication frequency was reduced by 20% which ultimately resulted in time and cost savings of 23% on an annual basis.

Cost savings of 23% on an annual basis.

Related Product

SGH 220 PLUS

Special complex thickened multifunctional grease for high-load applications.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/a-sponge-iron-plant-in-eastern-india-made-an-annual-savings-of-over-25--on-the-grease-cost-in-addition-to-the-reduced-maintenance-downtime-with-molygraph-s-spray-lube-1250
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

A sponge iron plant in Eastern India made an annual savings of over 25% on the grease cost in addition to the reduced maintenance downtime with Molygraph's SPRAYLUBE 1250

2 min read | 30 May 2023

Overview

Being the heart of the mill, Girth gear’s efficiency and life is very crucial

for the system. Girth gears are subjected to challenging operating

conditions like dust, dirt, extreme temperatures, water ingress and heavy

loads. These conditions demand special lubricants that can achieve

smooth running, can reduce wear and prevent corrosion without getting

fling off or building up in the gear.

Challenges

A sponge iron plant in Eastern India was spending heavily on the greasing of Kiln girth gear but still was facing issues like higher consumption, sludge formation in the teeth, less coverage area along with blocking of nozzles and wear of the gears.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Our Product Experts suggested which could perform better than the existing grease in harsh conditions of the mill area.

Solution

SPRAYLUBE 1250

Premium Grade Sprayable Fluid grease for Heavy Duty Open Gears.

Resistance to water washout.

Excellent adhesion to the gears.

Protection against friction, wear & corrosion.

Good sprayability and ease of handling & maintenance.

Result

The customer did a successful test run for over two months and has now standardized SPRAY LUBE 1250 - in the plant with an annual savings of over 25% on lubrication cost as well as a drastic reduction in maintenance downtime.

Reduction in maintenance downtime

Related Product

Spraylube 1250

Premium grade sprayable fluid grease for heavy-duty open gear.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/sponge-iron-plant-realized--15--annual-direct-cost-savings-and-50--lesser-wear-defects-by-switching-to-molygraph-grease
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Sponge iron plant realized ~15% annual direct cost savings and 50% lesser wear defects by switching to Molygraph grease

3 min read | 30 May 2023

Overview

A sponge iron plant in eastern India was spending heavily on greasing critical support bearings on the kilns. But still faced premature failure of bearings leading to high repair costs and unplanned shutdowns. Molygraph’s application experts recommended SG 1000 M 50 grease that provided superior lubrication, better reliability, longer component life and enabled ~15% direct cost saving on grease with 50% lesser wear defects

Customer pain/ challenge

The plant has 3 nos 100 TPD kilns, each fitted with 8 nos support bearings which are critical for the reliable operation. These bearings were grease guzzlers and yet faced premature failures. The customer wanted to improve on the bearing reliability and also control heavy expenditure on greasing.

Solution

Molygraph’s application experts studied the requirement and recommended Molygraph’s SG 1000 M 50 grease. Even though the per Kg price of this grease was higher than customer’s conventional grease, Molygraph promised lesser life cycle cost with longer lube change interval and enhanced reliability due to high performance specifications of this grease.

Customer benefits

While the customer's conventional grease needed 4 top-ups during the campaign period of 60 days, Molygraph’s SG 1000 M 50 grease brought it down by 50%. At the end of the campaign the conventional grease would have needed full re-greasing, but customer observed that even after 3 campaigns the strength of Molygraph’s SG 1000 M 50 grease was good and only 30-35% grease in the outer casing of the bearing needed to be replenished.

The customer also reported smoother operation of the bearings with reduced noise levels and 50% lesser bearing wear/ defects. There were no scoring marks, scratchings, burning marks on the bearing observed at the end of each campaign.

Result

~15% direct cost saving annually on bearing grease

~60% reduction in the man hours for top-up & replenishing the grease on annual basis

~50% lesser bearing issues & reduced noise level

Sponge iron plant realized ~15% annual direct cost savings and 50% lesser wear defects by switching to Molygraph grease

Related Product

SG 1000 M 50

High viscosity metal complex thickened grease fortified with solid lubricants for extreme load applications.

pages.title: Paper mill achieves significant reduction in maintenance downtime & cost by switching to Molygraph’s SGH 460 Premium grease
pages.text:
Paper mill achieves significant reduction in maintenance downtime & cost by switching to Molygraph’s SGH 460 Premium grease

CLIENT STORY

Paper mill achieves significant reduction in maintenance downtime & cost by switching to Molygraph’s SGH 460 Premium grease with superior water resistance properties

3 min read | 30 May 2023

Overview

Bearings in the Wet End, Dry End, and Calendering section of the Paper Mill are subjected to water ingress, steam, chemicals, and heavy loads.

A leading Paper manufacturer in Western India was facing performance issues with the current in use mill grease.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Our R&D team developed a greaseSGH 460 PREMIUMwhich could perform better than the existing grease in harsh conditions of the main mill area.

Challenge

The customer was facing the concern of grease changing colour and getting washed out from bearings due to water ingress. The customer had already tested other products on the said application but couldn’t get the desired results.

Solutions

MOLYGRAPH SGH 460 PREMIUM

Special Complex Heavy Duty High Temperature Water Resistant Grease

Molygraph's application experts studied the stringent application requirement of water resistance which was relatively lower in the case of the incumbent grease. This was identified as the main reason for the problem.

Our experts formulated a special metal complex base grease SGH 460 PREMIUM that had excellent water resistanceand high temperature, chemical resistance, and load-carrying properties.

Benefits

High load carrying capacity.

Excellent resistant to hot and cold water ingress.

Does not harden prematurely.

Capable of withstanding high shock loads.

Good wear protection.

High base oil viscosity ensures higher working loads on bearings.

Product Specifications:

SGH 460 PREMIUM

Special Complex Heavy Duty High Temperature Water Resistant Grease

Base oil: Refined Mineral Oil

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 460 cSt

Operating Temperature Range : -20°C to +200°C

Packaging: 1 Kg | 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

The customer did a successful test run for over two months and has now standardized SGH 460 PREMIUM in the plant with an annual savings of over 20% on the grease cost in addition to the reduced maintenance

downtime.

Reduced grease cost and maintenance downtime.

Related Product

SGH 460 M

Heavy-duty calcium sulphonate complex grease.

CLIENT STORY

Molygraph VLG 620 successfully passed pressure testing conditions on 3 different OEM valves.

1 min read | 05 June 2023

Overview

A valve maintenance company based in Malaysia required a valve sealant. The Malaysian distributor for Molygraph suggested VLG 620 to replace the current product being used. The customer required certain testing to be done to evaluate the quality and sealing properties of the lubricant.

Challenge

Should pass the pressure testing conditions on 3 different OEM valves. (FMC, Cameron and McEvoy)

Excellent ability to seal the valve.

Solution

MOLYGRAPH VLG 620

Synthetic Valve sealant with a special thickener and polymer base oil combination

Superb resistance to hydrocarbons, Co2 and H2S.

Excellent sealing ability.

Wide Temperature capability -40 to +230ºC.

Testing Plan

All valves are cleaned inside out to remove the grease sealant left over.

Water is injected inside the gate valve assembly (Simulation of actual scenario at off-shore facility) at a specific rate.

Injection of VLG 620 sealant and then re-running the pressure test.

Recording of data using digital pressure gauge.

pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

A sponge iron plant achieves 20% cost savings and a 75% reduction in grease top-up with Molygraph SG 1000 M 50 grease

2 min read | 30 May 2023

Overview

A sponge iron plant in India was spending heavily on greasing critical support bearings on the kilns & coolers. But they have faced multiple issues like oxidation at higher temperatures, frequent re lubrication, etc. Molygraph’s application experts recommended SG 1000 M 50 grease that provided superior lubrication, better reliability, longer component life, and enabled ~20% cost savings and a 75% reduction in grease top-ups.

Challenges

Higher Loads

High Temperature

Frequent Re lubrication

Higher Consumption

Solution

SG 1000 M 50

A SHEER STABLE EP FORTIFIED WATER RESISTANT GREASE FOR HIGH-LOAD APPLICATIONS

Molygraph’s application experts studied the requirement and recommended Molygraph’s SG 1000 M 50 grease. Even though the per Kg price of this grease was higher than the customer’s conventional grease, Molygraph promised lesser life cycle cost with longer lube change interval and enhanced reliability due to the high-performance specifications of this grease.

Benefits

Contains high-purity MoS2

Excellent shear stability at higher loads

Excellent water resistance property

The presence of Solid Lubricants improves load carrying and anti-wear properties

Protects against rust and corrosion

The high viscosity of base oil

Fortified with EP additives

Benefits of Molygraph SG 1000 M 50

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

COMPETITOR PRODUCT

SG 1000 M 50

TEST METHOD

180

300

250

500

Solid Lubricant

Nil

MoS2

Product Specifications:

SG 1000 M 50

A SHEER STABLE EP FORTIFIED WATER RESISTANT GREASE FOR HIGH-LOAD APPLICATIONS

Base Oil: Mineral

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 1000 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -20 to +200°C

Packaging: 1 Kg | 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

Regreasing interval increased to 175000 km

Reduction in grease consumption resulted in total cost savings of 6500 USD over a 6-month time period

Maximizes operational efficiency and profitability

High viscosity metal complex thickened grease fortified with solid lubricants for extreme load applications.

pages.title: SGH 220 Plus saves 25% on annual grease cost | Molygraph
pages.text:
SGH 220 Plus saves 25% on annual grease cost | Molygraph

CLIENT STORY

Molygraph SGH 220 Plus saves 25% on annual grease cost while ensuring reliable and efficient operation

3 min read | 03 August 2023

Overview

Bearings at the drier end are subjected to a high temperature of around 180 degrees C and heavy loads in the dry end section of the Paper. A leading Paper manufacturer in Western India was facing the issue of grease being leaked out. This led to frequent bearing failures in the mill area.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Our R&D team recommended SGH 220 Plus, a calcium sulfonate-thickened grease that could perform better than the existing grease in harsh conditions of the main mill area.

Challenge

Grease getting leaked out from bearings.

Frequent bearing failure.

Solution

SGH 220 Plus - Paper

MULTIFUNCTIONAL EXTREME PRESSURE HIGH LOAD WATER RESISTANT GREASE

Molygraph SGH 220 PLUS is a specialized lubricant specifically designed for the pulp and paper industry. It is a high-performance product that offers exceptional lubrication and protection in the challenging environments commonly found in this industry. This lubricant is formulated with a unique blend of high quality additives and base oils to ensure optimal performance and extended equipment life.

Benefits

Long-life grease for demanding applications.

Good shear stability & high load-carrying capacity.

Guards against rust and corrosion.

Excellent water resistance properties.

Excellent resistance against high temperatures and harsh chemicals

Product Specifications

SGH 220 Plus

MULTIFUNCTIONAL EXTREME PRESSURE HIGH LOAD WATER RESISTANT GREASE

Base oil: Mineral

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 220 cSt

Operating Temperature Range : -20°C to +200 °C

Packaging: 1 Kg | 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

The customer performed rigorous trials for a period of 2 months with MOLYGRAPH SGH 220 Plus under real operating conditions before switching to this grease confidently on a long-term basis after seeing the following benefits

Resolved the problem of grease coming out.

Significant reduction in premature bearing failure.

Reduced grease consumption and annual savings of over 25% in grease cost. Reduced maintenance downtime.

Cost reliable and efficient operation

Related Product

SGH 220 PLUS

Special complex thickened multifunctional grease for high-load applications.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/molygraph-graphol--gfl-6000-plus-improves-performance-and-productivity-by-providing-a-superior-alternative-to-conventional-die-forging-lubricants-
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph GRAPHOL® GFL 6000 PLUS improves performance and productivity by providing a superior alternative to conventional die forging lubricants.

2 min read | 20 July 2023

Overview

This manufacturer specializes in producing open and closed die forgings crafted from a range of materials, including carbon and alloy steel, micro-alloy steel, and stainless steel. Their clientele spans across diverse industries, such as Automotive, Railways, Farm Equipment, Bearings, Oil & Gas, Power, Construction, and Earth Moving & Mining applications. The dies they provide are forged, heat-treated, machined, and fully assembled to meet specific requirements.

However, the manufacturer encountered several challenges in their production process, including issues with uneven coating, the accumulation of hard residue, and components adhering to the die. Additionally, the manufacturing process resulted in the generation of smoke with a pungent odor.

Faced with these challenges, the manufacturer sought a solution and turned to Molygraph for assistance. Our team of technical experts recommended the use of GRAPHOL GFL 6000 PLUS, a high-performance graphite-based hot forging die lubricant, to address these issues.

Result

During the initial test run on the 2 Press Forge Machine with GRAPHOL® GFL 6000 PLUS, the customer observed that the earlier challenges faced were successfully resolved. There were no issues of sticking, residue deposition, or smoke generation.

After a long trial of 7 months, the product has been deployed.

Molygraph with its on-time delivery became the preferred supplier.

Resolved sticking residue and smoke generation issues

Related Product

Graphol GFL 6000 PLUS

High-performance graphite-based forging lubricant.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/molygraph-ultramill-grease-pu-premium-enables-a-sponge-iron-plant-to-achieve-a-remarkable-of-58--cost-savings
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph Ultramill Grease PU Premium enables a steel plant to achieve a remarkable of 58% Cost Savings

2 min read | 02 August 2023

Overview

Lubrication of continuous casters in steel mills is challenging due to continuous high temperatures and harsh conditions. A leading steel mill manufacturer in India reached out to Molygraph to provide them with a superior solution to their existing grease, which was displaying high levels of oxidation with poor performance. Molygraph recommended Ultramill PU Premium, a proprietary Polyurea chemistry technology that allowed for high permanence lubrication of their continuous casters.

Challenge

Due to extreme temperatures in the continuous caster application, conventional greases are prone to failure. The steel mill manufacturer was using a lithium-based EP grease that was melting out of the bearings, which resulted in increased pumping of the grease to keep temperatures in check. The customer faced the following key challenges.

Existing grease was failing at continuously high temperatures.

Excess grease needed to be pumped to prevent bearing failure.

Solution

Ultramill Grease PU Premium

Heavy Duty Long life Organic Thickened High-Temperature Grease

Ultramill PU Premium is a high-performance polyurea grease manufactured using a proprietary manufacturing process. The inherent properties of polyurea grease consist of high oxidation stability, water resistance, and excellent corrosion protection. Additionally in continuous casters. Polyurea burns cleanly, thus residue formation is minimized.

Benefit

Excellent lubricant for bearings & mechanisms exposed to high temperature.

superior anti-wear properties.

Excellent water resistance property

Protects against rust and corrosion

Very good flow characteristics in a wide temperature range.

Product Specifications:

Ultramill Grease PU Premium

Heavy Duty Long life Organic Thickened High-Temperature Grease

Base Oil: Refined Mineral Oil

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 460 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -20 to +180°C

Packaging: 180 Kg

Result

Reduction in grease consumption. From 1000 kgs per month to 540 kgs per month

Cost Savings of 58% over existing grease

Significant cost reduction

Related Product

Ultramill Grease PU Premium

Polyurea thickened high-temperature grease for continuous casters.

View Product

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/a-solar-panel-mounting-systems-provider-switched-to-molygraph-smoothform--2900-td-oil--saving-time--money--and-manpower--while-reducing-component-rejections-
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

A solar panel mounting systems provider switched to Molygraph Smoothform® 2900 TD oil, saving time, money, and manpower, while reducing component rejections.

4 min read | 20 July 2023

Overview

A leading brand of Solar Tracker and EPC Tracker in West India has in-house manufacturing of Module Mounting Structures for solar panels. During the manufacturing process, the customer was using a highly viscous and tacky rubber oil which was very difficult to remove during the washing process. This led to a higher percentage of rejects of the finished product after hot dip galvanizing.

Customers reached out to Molygraph for a solution and our technical experts suggested SMOOTHFORM® 2900 TD which is a high-performance oil.

Application Details

Operation: Drawing

Components: Solar Panel Parts (S6 Rail)

Material: Hot rolled GL

Steel Sheet Thickness: 1.8mm

Challenge

Due to its stickiness, the oil layer was difficult to remove by the washing process.

A hot bath (20min@60°C) is used for cleaning (1000 liters tank with Heaters) with Soap powder. But after hot bath cleaning also, the oil layer was persistent at intricate areas of many parts.

This necessitated re-cleaning of parts with cotton manually by 8-10 workers.

After cleaning, all parts are sent for the Hot dip galvanizing process. Due to the presence of the oil layer, 4-5% rejection was observed after the galvanization

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a strong cleaning solution to remove the oil layer from the component. Our experts studied the application and explained to the customer that the use of an additional cleaner would only increase the cost & processing time. Instead, we recommended the use of Molygraph’s Forming Oil - SMOOTHFORM® 2900 TD.

Solution

Molygraph SMOOTHFORM® 2900 TD

PREMIUM GRADE FINE BLANKING & FORMING OIL

Molygraph Smoothform 2900 TD is a high-performing metal working fluid for various machining and grinding operations. The product is designed for high-speed steel drawing. By reducing friction and wear, the oil extends the tool's life and reduces the frequency of tool replacement.

Benefits

Superior performance in severe tube drawing & pilgering operations

Enhanced load carrying capacity & suitable for high-speed drawing applications

Improved die life and low mandrel wear

The superior surface finish of the end product

Contains antioxidants, anti-corrosion, and special additive packages

Prolonged oil sump life

Product Specifications:

SMOOTHFORM® 2900 TD

PREMIUM GRADE FINE BLANKING & FORMING OIL

Density @ 29.5°C: 1.15 – 1.25 gms/cc

Viscosity @ 40°C: 270 – 290 cSt

Flash Point: >170°C

Packaging: 30 Ltrs | 210 Ltrs

Result

After the successful trials, the customer was able to eliminate two major processes from the manufacturing cycle .

Saved TIME, MANPOWER, and ENERGY

Achieved remarkable reduction in component rejection.

Smoother operations and enhanced product quality

Related Product

Smoothform 2900 TD

Premium Grade heavy duty forming and drawing Oil

View Product

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/molygraph-sgh-220-at-successfully-increases-the-lubrication-interval-by-175000-km-in-the-automotive-manufacturing-plant
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph SGH 220 AT successfully increases the lubrication interval upto 175000 km for wheel hub bearings of Heavy Commercial Vehicle.

2 min read | 31 July 2023

Overview

Wheel bearings reside inside the hub that connects the wheel to the axle. This makes proper lubrication of these bearings extremely important in terms of safety as well as maintenance downtime, especially in commercial vehicles. A fleet transport organization required longer maintenance intervals and wanted to reduce grease consumption while increasing productivity. Molygraph recommends SGH 220 AT, a wheel hub bearing grease designed to run for 200,000 km as an optimal solution for their requirements.

Challenge

Different greases are specified to be run for a certain number of km before regressing is required. The conditions for transport vehicles are harsh with shock loads due to bad roads, heat and humidity, and water ingress being key factors of bearing failures. The fleet transporter required grease that could run beyond the current 80,000 km to reduce maintenance and increase productivity and fleet efficiency.

Solution

SGH 220 AT

HIGH-PERFORMANCE EXTREME PRESSURE WATER-RESISTANT WHEEL HUB BEARING GREASE

SGH 220 AT uses a calcium sulfonate-based thickener system using our proprietary manufacturing process that provides unsurpassed performance over similar greases in the market. SGH 220 AT exhibits excellent adhesion, withstands heavy loads, and resists rust and corrosion.

Benefits:

Meets and exceeds NLGI -GC-LB / JIS K2220 specifications for automotive heavy-duty wheel bearing.

High-quality lubricating grease offers good shear stability.

Highly stable under shear loads amidst moist and humid environments.

Good adherence and sealing properties.

Excellent water resistance properties.

Guards against rust and corrosion.

Product Specifications:

SGH 220 AT

HIGH-PERFORMANCE EXTREME PRESSURE WATER-RESISTANT WHEEL HUB BEARING GREASE

Base Oil: Mineral

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 220 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -20 to +200°C

Packaging: 1 Kg | 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

Regreasing interval increased to 175000 km.

Reduction in grease consumption resulted in total cost savings of 6500 USD over a 6-month time period.

Achieved cost savings of $6500 over 6 months

Related Product

SGH 220 AT

High-performance Hub bearing and Axle grease for extended lifetime and optimum protection

pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Manufacturer switches coolant, reduces top-up concentration by 25% with Molygraph SMOOTHKUT® SS 5200

2 min read | 20 July 2023

Overview

An auto components manufacturer in South India used a conventional semi-synthetic metal cutting lubricant (Coolant) on CNCs and VMCs. The expenditure on the coolant was high when compared to sump life.There were issues like Rusting, and staining on machined components.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution and CPC reduction. Our application experts recommended SMOOTHKUT® SS 5200metalworking lubricant.

Application Details

Operation: Turning, Milling, Drilling, and Tapping

Machine: CNC & VMC

Components: Axle, Gears, Shafts, etc.

Water Type: DM water

Chloride Content: 15 PPM

Challenge

Poor performance of the coolant.

High consumption.

Post-processing issues like rusting and staining on machined component

Solution

SMOOTHKUT® SS 5200

SEMI-SYNTHETIC HIGH-OIL METALWORKING FLUID

This is a water-miscible metalworking fluid for multi metal, medium to heavy-duty machining. Ideally suitable for hard water conditions.

Benefits

High oil content ensures stable water mix fluid.

EP additives provide excellent cutting performance

Excellent tramp oil rejection and extended sump life.

Stable emulsion in hard water.

Excellent rust & Corrosion protection.

No scum or sludge residue formation.

HSE compliant and the product is free of heavy metals.

Product Specifications:

SMOOTHKUT SS 1105

SEMI-SYNTHETIC METAL WORKING FLUID

Appearance: Clear Yellow Liquid

Density @ 29.5°C : 1.0 ± 0.05 gms/cc

R. I. Factor: 1.56

Packaging: 30 Ltrs | 210 Ltrs

Result

Top-up concentration was reduced by 25% resulting in the monthly reduction of oil consumption & cost.

Desired rust protection without any staining of the machined component.

Improved reliability and longetivity

Related Product

Smoothkut SS 1105

Semi-synthetic metal working fluid.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/tractor-manufacturer-switches-to-molygraph-smoothkut--ss-1105-coolent--saves-27--in-costs--eliminates-bacterial-growth-and-foul-smell
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Tractor manufacturer switches to Molygraph SMOOTHKUT® SS 1105 coolent, saves 27% in costs, eliminates bacterial growth and foul smell

2 min read | 20 July 2023

Overview

A Tractor components manufacturer in north India was using a conventional metal cutting lubricant (Coolant) on CNCs and VMCs. The expenditure on the coolant was high when compared to sump life. There were issues like Rusting, misting, Bacterial growth, and Foul Odor.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution and CPC reduction. Our application experts recommendedSMOOTHKUT® SS 1105metalworking lubricant.

Application Details

Operation: Turning, Milling, Drilling, and Tapping

Machine: CNC & VMC

Components: Axle, Gears, Shafts, etc.

Water Type: Raw

Water Hardness: 280 PPM

Challenge

Poor performance of the coolant.

High consumption.

Post-processing issues like rusting, misting, and bacterial growth lead to a foul odor.

Solution

SMOOTHKUT® SS 1105

SEMI-SYNTHETIC METAL WORKING FLUID

SmoothKut SS 1105 is a high-performing metal performing working fluid for various machining and grinding operations. These fluids have excellent lubricating properties, which help reduce friction between the cutting tool and the workpiece. This reduces heat generation and extends the tool life, leading to improved machining efficiency.

Benefits

Highly economical.

No scum or residue formation.

Extends lubricity and provides extended tool life.

Good emulsion, biostability, and cleanliness in hard water.

Strong rust and corrosion protection under hard water conditions.

Excellent foam control & Efficient tramp oil rejection.

Improves surface finish.

HSE Compliant product free of heavy metals.

Product Specifications:

SMOOTHKUT SS 1105

SEMI-SYNTHETIC METAL WORKING FLUID

Appearance: Clear Yellow Liquid

Density @ 29.5°C : 1.0 ± 0.05 gms/cc

R. I. Factor: 1.56

Packaging: 30 Ltrs | 210 Ltrs

Result

Doubled operating life of coolant compared to earlier product.

27% direct cost saving annually.

72 hours of rust protection with no bacterial growth & smell.

Lower coolent consumption, decreased maintenance expenses

Related Product

Smoothkut SS 1105

Semi-synthetic metal working fluid.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/molygraph-hvg-28-1-exceeds-200-000-cycle-requirement--boosting-performance-and-efficiency-for-plastic-industry--customer-achieves-15--cost-savings
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph HVG 28/1 Exceeds 200,000 Cycle Requirement, Boosting Performance and Efficiency for Plastic Industry; Customer Achieves 15% Cost Savings

2 min read | 21 July 2023

Overview

Faucet lubrication is critical to reduce friction in hard to-turn faucets and prevent leakage. A leading industrial faucet manufacturer in India required better performance from their existing lubricant. Molygraph recommended HVG 28/1, a silicone lubricant and sealant specially developed for faucets to help mitigate their problems.

Challenge

The customer was not satisfied with their existing lubricant. There were

complaints from the market regarding hard-turning faucets as well as

leakage issues. The customer wanted a solution to the following key

critical problems

The grease should pass 200,000 cycles in an in-house test developed

by the customer

Competitive pricing to reduce their overall cost with a performance

upgrade

Solution

HVG 28/1

SOFT-GRADE MULTIPURPOSE SILICONE GREASE

HVG 28/1 is a high-viscosity silicone lubricant and sealant that is ideal for lubricating faucets. The manufacturing process is key here and Molygraph’s proprietary production technique ensures that there is no age hardening and the lubricant has a high degree of stability. Additionally, the base oil viscosity is modified to create an optimal blend that suits the application perfectly.

Benefits

The product is food-grade and halal-certified.

Compatible with most plastics and elastomers.

Offers good resistance to solvents.

Better noise reduction properties.

The high viscosity of base oil.

Product Specifications:

HVG 28/1

SOFT-GRADE MULTIPURPOSE SILICONE GREASE

Base Oil: Silicone

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 4000 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -40 to +200°C

Packaging: 1 Kg | 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

HVG 28/1 passed the customer requirement of 200,000 cycles ensuring on-field performance and efficiency.

The customer achieved overall cost savings of 15%.

Minimizing wear and extending the lifespan of companies

Related Product

HVG 28/1

Soft grade multipurpose silicone grease for fittings, seals, and plastic parts.

CLIENT STORY

Molygraph DR Grease HD 1: Exceptional Adhesion to Drill Rods Leads to Remarkable Reduction in Vibration Levels and 15% Decrease in Grease Consumption

3 min read | 20 July 2023

Overview

Drill rod grease is used in drilling operations to reduce friction and wear on drill rods and other components in a drilling operation. A customer in Australia got in touch with Molygraph to replace their existing lubricant. They were facing issues of insufficient lubricity that led to increased vibration between contacting surfaces and inconsistent torque spikes. The variation in torque has a direct correlation to increased frictional wear in the components. Molygraph recommended DR Grease HD 1 as a replacement for their existing lubricant.

Challenge

Drill rods are subjected to heavy loads and frictional wear, and insufficient lubrication can lead to increased wear and tear in drill rods while reducing their life span. The following was the core issue faced by the customer

Excessive vibration which was a result of insufficient lubrication was causing the drill rods to crack and was reducing the life of the drill string.

Solution

DR GREASE HD 1

HIGHLY WATER-RESISTANT & TEMPERATURE-RESISTANT DRILL ROD GREASE

Molygraph recommended DR Grease HD 1 which was specifically developed for drill rod lubrication. A blend of polymeric tackifiers, solid lubricants, and a specialized thickener system has resulted in a lubricant suited for this application. The key features of DR Grease HD 1 are

Key Benefits:

Reducing friction and increasing the efficiency of the drilling process.

Extend the life of not only the rod but the head as well.

Increasing the lifespan of the equipment.

Protects against rust and corrosion.

Prevents chattering of the rods.

Benefits of Molygraph DR Grease HD 1

COMPETITOR PRODUCT

Superior film-forming capability

-10/+200

-

Product Specifications:

DR GREASE HD 1

HIGHLY WATER-RESISTANT & TEMPERATURE-RESISTANT DRILL ROD GREASE

Base Oil: Mineral

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 460 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -10 to +200°C

Packaging: 18 Kg

Result

Excellent adhesion to drill rods resulted in much-lowered vibration levels.

Overall grease consumption was reduced by 15% due to lowered relubrication intervals.

Lower upfront cost of DR Grease HD 1 against the existing lubricant provided an excellent performance-to-value ratio and resulted in significant cost savings.

Increased lifespan of drill rods

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/steel-industry-achieves-over-25--annual-savings-with-successful-test-run--minimizes-maintenance-downtime-and-costs-on-girth-gear
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Steel Industry Achieves Over 25% Annual Savings with Successful Test Run, Minimizes Maintenance Downtime and Costs on Girth Gear

2 min read | 02 August 2023

Overview

A sponge iron plant in Eastern India was spending heavily on the greasing of Kiln girth gear but still was facing performance issues.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Our Product

Experts studied the harsh operating conditions of the plant and recommended Molygraph SPRAYLUBE 1250 which is designed for performance in such conditions.

Challenge

Girth gears are subjected to challenging operating conditions like dust, dirt, extreme temperatures, water ingress and heavy loads.

The sponge iron plant was spending heavily on lubrication but still was facing issues like higher consumption, sludge formation in the teeth, less coverage area along with blocking of nozzles and wear of the gears.

These conditions demand special high performance lubricants that can achieve smooth running, can reduce wear and prevent corrosion without getting fling off or building up in the gear.

Solution

SPRAYLUBE 1250

Premium Grade Sprayable Fluid grease for Heavy Duty Open Gears.

Spraylube 1250 is a high-performance lubricant specifically designed for open gear applications. It is formulated to provide superior protection, reduce wear, and ensure smooth operation of gears Spraylube 1250 incorporates advanced molybdenum disulfide (MoS2) technology, which ensures excellent lubrication even under extreme operating conditions.

Benefits

Sprayable grease that adheres well to base metal

Withstands extreme pressures and shock loads

Prevents scoring, scuffing, galling and pitting

Does not contain lead or other harmful metal

Product Specifications:

Spraylube 1250

Premium Grade Sprayable Fluid Grease For Heavy Duty Open Gear

Base Oil: Refined Mineral Oil

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 1250 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -20 to +180°C

Packaging: 180 Kg

Result

The customer did a successful test run for over two months

Realized over 25% savings calculated on annualized basis

Reduced maintenance downtime and costs on girth gear

Now standardized on use of SPRAYLUBE 1250 in the plant

Achieves annual savings of over 25%

Related Product

Spraylube 1250

Premium grade sprayable fluid grease for heavy-duty open gear.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/a-tyre-pyrolysis-plant-improves-plant-efficiency--reduces-maintenance-needs-and-lowers-the-grease-consumption-by-70--using-molygraph-s-specialty-grease-sg-1000-m50
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

A tyre pyrolysis plant improves plant efficiency, reduces maintenance needs and lowers the grease consumption by 70% using Molygraph’s specialty grease SG 1000 M 50

3 min read | 03 August 2023

Overview

Tire pyrolysis refers to a technique of breaking down used tyres in the absence of oxygen. Shredded tyres, at temperatures between 250°C and 500°C, produce fuel oil, carbon black, steel wire and gas. An indirectly heated rotary kiln is the main equipment in this process The critical bearings of this kiln are exposed to a very high operating temperature and loads continuously.

An ordinary general purpose grease used by the customer resulted in frequent re-greasing and bearing failure. Molygraph’s application experts studied the process and recommended Molygraph’s specialty grease SG 1000 M50.

Challenge

Critical bearing in the indirectly heated rotary kiln subjected to longer operation cycles

Very high operating temperature & pressure

Use of ordinary general purpose AP3 grease resulted in:

Frequent bearing failure

Production stoppages

Frequent re-greasing needs

High consumption of grease

High maintenance time and cost

Low plant availability and efficiency

Solution

Molygraph SG 1000 M50

A Sheer Stable EP fortified water resistant grease

Excellent shear stability

Protects against rust and corrosion

Operating Temperature Range : (-)20 °C to (+)200 °C

Molygraph offered a consultative trial in the customer’s plant to demonstrate the performance under actual operating conditions and helped calculate the RoI to make a strong techno-commercial case for the customer’s internal approval.

Product specifications:

Molygraph SG 1000 M50

A Sheer Stable EP fortified water resistant grease

Base [Thickener] : Metal Complex

Base oil : Mineral

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 1000 cSt

NLGI Grade : #2

Operating Temperature Range : -20/+200 °C

Packaging: 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

Due to high performance & long operating life of Molygraph’s SG 1000 M50 grease, complete re-greasing is not required between operating cycles. Just a top-up is enough.

The plant is now able to run continuously for 3 cycles resulting in higher plant efficiency and improved yield.

Other Applications of SG 1000 M50 - A Sheer Stable EP fortified water resistant grease:

Suitable for slow moving heavy duty applications in steel strip mills, agricultural.

machinery, rubber mills, paper mills, cement mills and hot and cold rolling mills.

For work roll and back up roll bearings, low rpm motor bearings, geared couplings, supporting bearings and various other bearings subjected to extreme pressures or located in shock load zones.

Product is designed with high base oil viscosity and is therefore not recommended for relatively fast moving bearings as the high viscosity in all probability may cause internal friction and lead to increased operating

temperatures.

Reduction in bearing failure & unplanned process stoppage

Related Product

SG 1000 M 50

High viscosity metal complex thickened grease fortified with solid lubricants for extreme load applications.

View Product

Kiln bearings

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/a-textile-house-saved-20--on-lube-oil-expenses--improved-efficiency--and-reduced-energy-consumption-of-stenter-machines-by-switching-to-molygraph-s-stenol-200-st
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

A textile house saved 20% on lube oil expenses, improved efficiency, and reduced energy consumption of stenter machines by switching to Molygraph’s STENOL 200 ST

3 min read | 18 July 2023

Overview

A leading textile house in western India was facing problems like higher oil consumption, frequent re lubrication needs, and suboptimal operational efficiency of their stenter machines.

After technical consultation with the Molygraph’s expert, they switched to Molygraph’s STENOL 200 ST High Performance Stenter Chain Oil.

As a result, the customer saved 20% on lubrication expenses and experienced trouble-free operation with lesser need for re-lubrication. Molygraph’s ultra-efficient distribution network with local stock points also solved customer’s long delivery nightmare with other brands.

Challenge

Long chain is continuously traversing through various zones in the stenter machine.

Very high operating temperature (180-200 °C) within the hot chambers

Ordinary chain oil has higher evaporation rate & forms undesired carbon suit

Solution

Molygraph STENOL 200 ST - High-Performance Stenter Chain Oil was recommended due to its high performance capability & features such as:

Thermally and chemically stable over elevated temperatures.

Reduced consumption of chain oil at high temperatures, high speeds, and adverse operating conditions.

Prevents hard carbon deposits on chains.

Fine oil film remains on the chains even after passing multiple times through high-temperature ovens.

No excess oil or dripping from chains.

It penetrates well and lubricates the stenter pins and functional parts of the chains.

Suitable for most domestic and imported stenter machine brands and for Polyfilm stretching stenter chain.

Molygraph offered a consultative trial in the customer’s plant to demonstrate the performance under actual operating conditions and helped calculate the RoI.

Product Specifications:

Molygraph STENOL 200 ST

High-Performance Stenter Chain Oil

Base Oil: Synthetic

Viscosity @ 40°C : 200 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: up to 250°C

Packaging: 5 Ltrs | 30 Ltrs | 210 Ltrs

Result

After the successful trial and usage, the customer observed significant improvement in terms of.

20% reduction in chain oil expenses due to reduced need for re-lubrication.

Improved machine efficiency with a significant reduction in carbon suits. Machines run faster and consume less energy.

Local support and quick just-in-time delivery.

Improved efficiency, and reduced energy consumption of stenter machines.

Related Product

Stenol 200 ST (N)

High-performance stenter chain oil.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/molygraph-neverust-hd-504-extends-corrosion-protection-to-2-months--doubles-sump-life--and-delivers-22--cost-savings-
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph Neverust HD 504 Extends Corrosion Protection to 2 Months, Doubles Sump Life, and Delivers 22% Cost Savings!

2 min read | 03 August 2023

Overview

An engineering organization machinings automotive components such as shafts and gears was facing heavy rust and corrosion issues as well as a reduction in sump life. They were currently getting component corrosion protection of 1 month and a sump life of 8 days. They required a high-performance rust preventive oil to increase the duration of protection as well as sump life. Molygraph recommended its premium Neverust 504 HD rust preventive lubricant to achieve the performance requirements.

Challenge

The customer’s first priority was to increase the sump life as that was directly affecting cost. The major challenges for Neverust 504 HD were the following

Increase the sump life

Increase the duration of the protection of the components

Solution

NEVERUST HD 504

SOLVENT BASE RUST AND CORROSION INHIBITOR

CRG 100 M has been specifically designed for wire rope lubrication. Its penetrative properties have been enhanced using special solvents and solid lubricating additives. Further, it exhibits excellent corrosion and rust-preventive properties that enhance overall product performance. The main features of CRG 100 M are listed below

Key benefits:

Easily penetrates into thin grooves and notches.

Excellent non-staining properties.

Protects against rust and corrosion.

Good water displacing and demulsification properties.

Protection against salt water and humid atmosphere.

Product Specifications:

NEVERUST HD 504

SOLVENT BASE RUST AND CORROSION INHIBITOR

Film Type: Dry waxy

Viscosity @ 40°C : 1 - 3 cSt

Humidity Test : > 720 hrs

Packaging: 30 Ltrs | 210 Ltrs

Result

Sump Life doubled to 16 days from 8 days

Rust and corrosion protection increase to 2 months of 1 Month

Total cost savings of 22% due to higher sump life

Sump life doubled to 16 days, rust and corrosion protection increased to 2 months.

Related Product

Neverust HD 504/506/508

Solvent-based rust & corrosion inhibitor.

pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph CRG 100 M Extends Relubrication Interval from 7 to 12 Days, Delivering Cost Savings of Over 25%

3 min read | 21 July 2023

Overview

Wire rope lubrication is the process of applying lubricant to the individual wires and strands of a wire rope. This helps to reduce friction between the wires and strands, which in turn reduces wear and tear on the rope, extends its lifespan, and improves its performance. A well-known cold rolled steel plant required a solution to their existing wire rope lubricant. Their requirement was to extend relubrication intervals and prevent premature damage to their wire ropes. After studying the application in detail Molygraph recommended CRG 100 M, a state-of-the-art wire rope lubricant with excellent penetrating properties that helps extend the life of the wire rope.

Challenge

Not all wire rope lubricants are created equal. It is important to make sure that the lubricant actually penetrates into the wire ropes rather than just acting as a surface coating. Without good penetration properties, the wire rope is apt to damage or break which can be costly in the long run. The following were the issues faced by the customer

Lack of penetration of wire rope lubricant into individual wire rope strands

Needed reduction in relubrication intervals

Preventing damage to the wire ropes

Solution

CRG 100 M

A NON-MELT MOLYBDENUM PREMIUM GRADE WIRE ROPE LUBRICANT

CRG 100 M has been specifically designed for wire rope lubrication. Its penetrative properties have been enhanced using special solvents and solid lubricating additives. Further, it exhibits excellent corrosion and rust-preventive properties that enhance overall product performance.

Benefits:

Fortified with high purity MoS2 & Graphite to reduce internal friction.

Good penetrating property to ensure proper hemp or core wire lubrication.

Excellent protection from humid weather & aggressive chemicals.

Reduces friction between strands Does not drip at high temperatures.

Good corrosion-resistant properties

Fluid consistency for easy brush ability, dipping, or spraying application.

Product Specifications:

CRG 100 M

A NON-MELT MOLYBDENUM PREMIUM GRADE WIRE ROPE LUBRICANT

Base Oil: Highly Refined Mineral Oil

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 460 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -10 to +180°C

Packaging: 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

Relubrication interval increase from 7 to 12 days

Cost savings of over 25% from the increase in relubrication interval.

Improved performance and productivity

Related Product

CRG 100 M / M Fluid

Premium grade penetrating & low friction,
Wire rope fluid lubricant fortified with MoS2.

View Product

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/auto-g-35-mv-2-eliminated-failures-caused-due-to-carbon-deposits-and-copper-corrosion-in-electrical-switches
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

AUTO G 35 MV 2 eliminated failures caused due to carbon deposits and copper corrosion in electrical switches

2 min read | 31 July 2023

Overview

An automotive component manufacturing company in West India was using a general-purpose Lithium grease on the copper terminals of the switch. A switch consists of plastic and copper parts and the lubricant being used should be compatible with both the material. Prospect customer was facing the problem of residue formation, black deposits on the contact terminal along with copper corrosion during the test run.

The manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Molygraph’s Automotive experts studied the application and environment criteria and recommended our specialty AUTO G 35 MV 2 grease.

Challenge

Application: Push Pull switches for commercial vehicles

Initial Fill: 1.50 gm

Test Requirements:

Plastic and copper compatibility

No residue formation on the contact terminal

To pass the test run for 50,000 cycles at 24 Volt and 15 Amps

Corrosion protection

Solution

AUTO G 35 MV 2

SYNTHETIC GREASES FOR PLASTIC TO PLASTIC COMPONENTS AND PRECISION BEARING

Benefits:

Molygraph Auto G 35 MV 2 passed the tests with superior performance.

There was no residue or corrosion on the copper terminal.

Also, the switch action was very smooth with no noise.

Product Specifications:

AUTO G 35 MV 2

SYNTHETIC GREASES FOR PLASTIC TO PLASTIC COMPONENTS AND PRECISION BEARING

Base Oil: PAO

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 30-35 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -50 to +130°C

Packaging: 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

Very high reliability of the functional switch.

ZERO failures with smooth operation of electrical switches.

Value for the OEM client and the Truck driver operating the switch.

Highly valued by the OEM Clients

Related Product

Auto G 35 MV2

PAO based Lithium grease for moderate movements & light loads.

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/animal-feed-manufacturer-solves-grease-pumpability-issue-on-critical-bearings-of-pellet-mills-with-molygraph-s-sgh-220-plus-2-1-grease
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Animal Feed Manufacturer Solves Grease Pumpability Issue on Critical Bearings of Pellet Mills with Molygraph’s SGH 220 Plus 2/1 Grease

3 min read | 20 July 2023

Overview

One of India’s leading manufacturers of animal feed was facing grease pumpability issues on critical bearings of pellet mills leading to under/ over greasing of bearings.

Molygraph’s application experts studied the issue and recommended use of Molygraph’s specialty grease SGH 220 Plus 2/1. Customer was super happy after experiencing the results of this grease and recommended it for use on pellet mills and hammer mills.

Challenge

Customer has a 60 TPH capacity plant with many critical & high speed machines.

The Andritz make Pellet Mill used is a fairly complex machine with multiple critical bearings of Timken & SKF make that are lubricated using a centralized mechanism.

Under/over lubrication of bearings due to poor pumpability of their current grease on a centralized lubrication system.

Drying-up of grease in machine idle state during shut-down maintenance.

High energy cost & low efficiency.

Solution

Molygraph SGH 220 Plus 2/1

Soft Grade Multifunctional Extreme Pressure Water Resistant Grease

Excellent pumpability when used in a centralized lubrication system.

Doesn’t dry up in machine idle state during the shutdown maintenance period.

Highly stable under shear loads amidst moist and humid environment.

Excellent water resistance properties.

Guards against rust and corrosion.

Contains no heavy metals or ingredients harmful to human health.

Longer re-greasing intervals leading to optimized consumption.

Product specifications:

Molygraph SGH 220 Plus 2/1

Soft Grade Multifunctional Extreme Pressure Water Resistant Grease

Base oil : Mineral Base Oil

Viscosity @40°C : 220 cSt

Operating Temperature Range : -20°C to +200°C

Packaging: 1 Kg / 5 Kg / 20 Kg / 180 Kg

Result

Elimination of doubts related to under/over lubrication of the bearings.

No fear of grease drying-up in the machine's planned shutdown.

Enhanced life of critical & costly bearing.

Professional application support and quick delivery from local stock point.

More solutions from Molygraph for Animal Feed manufacturing:

SGH 220 Plus: Multifunctional Extreme Pressure High Load Water Resistant Grease

SAFOL FGG: NSF & HALAL certified food grade grease

SAFOL Gear Oils: NSF & HALAL certified food grade gear oils

Ultra Gear Syn: High performance Hydrocarbon-based synthetic gear & bearing oil

PUG 9000 H: Long life organic thickened high temperature grease.

Extended equipment lifespan and minimized maintenance requirements.

Related Product

SGH 220 PLUS

Special complex thickened multifunctional grease for high-load applications.

pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph Flurotemp 512 provides long-lasting performance in the Automotive Industry by saving cost and boost efficiency by 15%.

3 min read | 01 August 2023

Overview

An automotive garage equipment manufacturer was encountering serious issues lubricating the conveyors in their paint booth oven. The bearings used in high-temperature conveyors are subject to high continuous temperatures of over 160 degrees Celsius. The existing grease could not withstand these temperatures and was seen running out of the bearings, leading to increased republication intervals and bearing failures. The equipment manufacturer reached out to Molygraph for a solution. Flurotemp 512, a PTFE-PFPE-based grease was recommended by Molygraph, which helped the customer find the ideal solution to the problem at hand.

Challenge

Lubrication of high-temperature conveyor bearings provides a unique challenge. The high operating temperatures do not allow conventional greases to function optimally and lead to high degrees of maintenance downtime and bearing failures. The customer was facing the following critical issues

The grease was either melting and running out of the bearings or

was getting hard and not allowing the bearing to operate.

Frequent maintenance downtime.

Solution

FLUROTEMP 512

A HIGH-PERFORMANCE HIGH-TEMPERATURE CHEMICAL RESISTANT FLUORINATED GREASE.

Molygraph recommended Flurotemp 512 for lubricating the customer’s conveyor chain bearings. The unique chemistry consists of a fluorinated thickener and base oil that have been designed to run at continuously extremely high temperatures. Flurotemp 512 has the following key benefits.

Benefits

Non oxidizing & chemical resistant.

Low carbonization at high temperatures.

Low evaporation rate.

Reducing maintenance costs (high uptime and no relube).

Increased output & profitability (continuous running).

Product Specifications

FLUROTEMP 512

A HIGH-PERFORMANCE HIGH-TEMPERATURE CHEMICAL RESISTANT FLUORINATED GREASE.

Base Oil: PFPE

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 500 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -30 to +260°C

Packaging: 1 Kg

Result

No relubrication for 3 months after greasing.

Flurotemp 512 stayed in place and provided optimum lubrication without any blackening, hardening, or melting.

The initial cost of the product was offset by the low consumption, bearing failure prevention, and decreased maintenance downtime, leading to an overall cost benefit of 15% to the customer.

Annual cost saving by 15%

Related Product

Flurotemp 512

PTFE thickened fluorinated synthetic grease for high-temperature application.

pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph Droid Grease Amplifies Gearbox Performance with Remarkable Enhancements in Wear and Friction Factors

3 min read | 01 August 2023

Overview

Industrial robot lubrication is critical to ensure that not only is the robot in question operating at its peak but continues to do so under a prolonged and consistent period of time. A hot forging components manufacturer was facing issues of overheating and frequent relubrication in their fleet of robots. They required greater productivity and efficiency and Molygraph proposed Droid Grease 0, a grease specifically developed for industrial robot lubrication. Approved by Ford India and other industrial robot servicing organizations, Droid Grease 0 has changed the game in robot lubrication and performance.

Challenge

Industrial robots are involved in material handling, assembly, or dispensing, and over time they can become exposed to the effects of wear and corrosion. This is a result of the extensive movement that robots perform each and every day, often for long periods of time. The customer was using Fanuc M900, IB 400L, J4, J5, and J6 series of industrial robots in the hot forging plant. The following were the core issues faced by the customer

Premature wear in reduction gears where lubrication is critical.

Frequent relubrication and maintenance downtime.

Solution

DROID GREASE

Droid Grease 0 is a semi-synthetic lithium-based grease specially designed to lubricate the reduction gears in industrial robots.

A special additive package helps control the friction regime of bearings to increase the life of robot reducers. The following are the key properties of Droid Grease.

Key Benefits:

Good oxidation stability over elevated temperatures.

High load bearing and anti-wear properties.

Excellent pumpability even in cold conditions

Protection against rust and corrosion.

Low iron pick-up after prolonged use, complying with Robot manufacturers’ requirements.

Benefits of Molygraph Droid Grease

.

COMPETITOR PRODUCT

DROID GREASE 0

TEST METHOD

190

81.3

Superior film-forming capability

Evaporation Loss @1000 (°C), 24 Hrs.

1

<1.0

ASTM D 972

Excellent evaporation loss

Product Specifications:

DROID GREASE 0

LONG-LIFE REDUCTION GEAR GREASE FOR INDUSTRIAL ROBOTS

Base Oil: Semi Synthetic

Base Oil Viscosity @ 40°C : 80 cSt

Operating Temperature Range: -40 to +130°C

Packaging: 5 Kg | 20 Kg | 180 Kg

Result

Noticeable improvement in wear and friction factors.

The above was further reinforced.

Reduction in re-lubrication interval

Industrial robot lubrication is critical to ensure that not only is the robot in question operating at its peak but continues to do so under a prolonged and consistent period of time. A hot forging components manufacturer was facing issues of overheating and frequent relubrication in their fleet of robots. They required greater productivity and efficiency and Molygraph proposed Droid Grease 0, a grease specifically developed for industrial robot lubrication. Approved by Ford India and other industrial robot servicing organizations, Droid Grease 0 has changed the game in robot lubrication and performance.

Challenge

Industrial robots are involved in material handling, assembly, or dispensing, and over time they can become exposed to the effects of wear and corrosion. This is a result of the extensive movement that robots perform each and every day, often for long periods of time. The customer was using Fanuc M900, IB 400L, J4, J5, and J6 series of industrial robots in the hot forging plant. The following were the core issues faced by the customer

Premature wear in reduction gears where lubrication is critical.

Frequent relubrication and maintenance downtime.

Solution

DROID GREASE

Droid Grease 0 is a semi-synthetic lithium-based grease specially designed to lubricate the reduction gears in industrial robots.

A special additive package helps control the friction regime of bearings to increase the life of robot reducers. The following are the key properties of Droid Grease.

Key Benefits:

Good oxidation stability over elevated temperatures.

High load bearing and anti-wear properties.

Excellent pumpability even in cold conditions

Protection against rust and corrosion.

Low iron pick-up after prolonged use, complying with Robot manufacturers’ requirements.

Benefits of Molygraph Droid Grease
