CLIENT STORY

Molygraph MFG 150 ST 3 achieves 30% cost savings through extended re-lubrication intervals, providing superior performance.

2 min read | 20 July 2023

Overview

Stone-crushing equipment is subjected to heavy loads under harsh conditions. A stone-crushing customer faced problems concerning the existing lubricant, which was resulting in bearing failures due to the inability of the grease to stay in place. Molygraph recommended MFG ST-3, a grease specifically developed for the stone crusher industry, that has now become the industry benchmark.

Challenge

Crusher bearings are subjected to high loads, continuous operation, and hot and humid conditions. Conventional EP greases cannot maintain the performance and either dry out or are squeezed out of the bearings. There were three critical issues the customer was facing.

The inability of the grease to stay in the crusher bearings

Frequent relubrication

Bearing failures

Solution

A MULTIFUNCTIONAL HEAVY-DUTY GREASE

The Molygraph recommended MFG 150 ST-3 is a special metal complex grease with a state-of-the-art additive package as well as special tackifiers that make sure that grease maintains high degrees of adhesion.

Benefits

High EP & Load properties.

Excellent adhesion due to the addition of special tackifiers.

Excellent shear stability at higher loads

Excellent water resistance property

High-temperature oxidation stability

Guards against rust and corrosion

Performs well in adverse conditions

Benefits of Molygraph MFG 150 ST 3

COMPETITOR PRODUCT

Packaging: 20 Kg | 180 Kg

A high degree of adhesion doubled the relubrication interval from their existing product

The grease was not squeezed out of the bearing due to the highest in-class load-carrying properties

Savings of over 30% are just due to increased relubrication intervals, leading to lower grease consumption.

Extended durability of the equipment

pages.title: https://www.molygraph.com/newsroom/molygraph-smoothform--4700-s-k--reduces-scrap-generation-by-66---leading-to-improved-efficiency-and-cost-savings-
pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Molygraph SMOOTHFORM® 4700 S(K) reduces scrap generation by 66%, leading to improved efficiency and cost savings.

3 min read | 21 July 2023

Overview

Aluminum foil containers are vastly popular for the packaging of food products. A manufacturer of these containers was facing problems of foul smell on storage of containers and high scrap generation on the machine. The root cause of this was the punching oil used on the machine.

Molygraph’s application experts studied the case and proposed SMOOTHFORM® 4700 S(K) punching oil. The solution worked perfectly meeting customer’s expectations and resulting in improved quality of product, fewer rejects, and lowered manufacturing cost.

Challenge

An imported Punching & stamping mold release oil used was having limitations

The oil had a filthy smell and the same was getting passed on to the final product

The evaporation time of the oil was very long so when it is packed wet it will stink after storage.

Foul odor associated with the containers when stored in the warehouse over extended periods

The high amount of scrap generation due to inadequate lubrication from the oil

To prevent cracks, silicon oil has to be added in more quantities, hence the cost of containers increases further.

Solution

SMOOTHFORM® 4700 S(K)

HIGH-PERFORMANCE FIN PRESS OIL FOR AIR CONDITIONERS AND OTHER PUNCHINGS

Avoids oil staining during high-speed punching with silicon steel plates or electrical thin plates due to efficient vaporization.

Each sheet can be readily separated through the use of low-boiling point solvents and special additives during the annealing process.

Extends the life of metal molds during high-speed stroking, thereby increasing productivity.

Reduces cracks with a highly purified base oil with special lubrication improvement agents and abrasion prevention agents.

Provides excellent long-term chemical stability. High load-carrying capacity. Avoids tool breakages.

Colorless and odorless. Does not react with aluminum or copper.

Oil residue compatible with R-407C, R-409, R 410A,R-22,R-134A, and other New Age Freons.

Environment-friendly product.

Product Specifications:

SMOOTHFORM® 4700 S(K)

HIGH-PERFORMANCE FIN PRESS OIL FOR AIR CONDITIONERS AND OTHER PUNCHINGS

Density 29.5°C: 0.75 -0.80 gm/cc

Viscosity @ 40°C : 1-2 cSt

Flash Point : 50°C, Aniline Point : 80°C

Packaging: 30 Litrs I 200 Litrs

Result

After the successful trial and usage, the customer observed significant improvement in terms of

66% reduction in the generation of scrap, thus reducing the overall cost of manufacturing.

Resolved the chronic problem of foul odor retention on stored containers.

Local support and just-in-time quick delivery.

Improved efficiency and cost savings

Related Product

Smoothform 4900 S(K)

Superior grade fin press oil.

View Product

pages.text:
CLIENT STORY

Improved Efficiency of Kiln Tyre Chair Pads with Supra Flow HT

2 min read | 07 November 2025

Overview

In the high-stress environment of cement manufacturing,kiln tyre chair padsare exposed to extreme heat, continuous friction, and heavy mechanical loads. These demanding conditions often lead to increased shell temperatures, metallic wear, scoring on tyre surfaces, and lubrication delivery issues. These challenges can negatively impact equipment reliability, increase maintenance frequency, and affect overall operational efficiency.

Challenges

Excessive increase in kiln shell temperatures

Metallic wear between the tyre and the chair pad

Pumpability issues affecting lubricant delivery

Scoring observed on the tyre surface

Solution

Molygraph Supraflow HTwas introduced to tackle these application-specific challenges. Designed for extreme operating conditions, the grease provides superior protection and consistent performance.

Key Benefits:

Forms a stable, uniform solid lubricant layer even under high thermal loads

Reduces friction, metallic contact, and surface scoring

Improves pumpability for consistent application

Enhances protection against wear, extending component life.

Results Achieved

Consistent Performance: Supraflow HT performed reliably across all chair pad sections under high-temperature conditions

Thermal & Vibration Control: Operating temperatures and vibrations were kept within optimal limits

Improved Equipment Efficiency: Reduced wear and smoother operation led to higher overall machine reliability and output

No Compromise on Quality: All improvements were achieved without impacting production quality

Molygraph Supraflow HThas proven to be a game-changer in maintaining kiln health, reducing downtime, and improving long-term performance in the cement industry.

Related Product

Supraflow HT

High-Temperature Lubricating Compound Fortified with Solid Lubricants.

CLIENT STORY

How OEMs Achieved Better GSL Performance with LSG 100 F / 500 F

2 min read | 13 August 2025

Overview

A leading automotive component manufacturer in India was seeking improvement with their gear shifter systems, especially under Indian driving conditions. Molygraph was approached to provide a solution that would enhance the haptic feedback, reduce gear shifting effort, and meet stringent OEM validation criteria without compromising on compatibility and long-term performance.

Challenge

Significant gear-shifting force was causing driver fatigue.

Lack of awareness around the right grease for GSL lubrication suited to Indian road conditions.

High time, cost, and effort involved in getting a new product validated.

OEM involvement with strict performance benchmarks.

Material compatibility with plastics and elastomers used in gear shifter assemblies.

Need to meet demanding functional and tactile (haptic) expectations.

Solution

Product Recommended:Molygraph LSG 100 F/ 500 F

Compatible with POM, PA, and a wide range of elastomers used in GSL mechanisms.

Thixotropic silicone grease ensuring consistent damping and smooth gear engagement.

500 cSt base oil viscosity, ideal for Indian driving and environmental conditions.

Enhanced tactile (haptic) feedback during gear shifting.

Result

Successful validation and acceptance by the OEM—breaking the monopoly of an existing supplier in a critical application.

Significantly improved driving experience due to smoother gear shifts.

While there was no direct cost-saving, the trust built with the OEM is invaluable.

Opened up an annual business potential for future projects.

We are proud to achieve ISO certification

1 min read | 20 March 2024

Molygraph Lubricants is now officially certified in ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001 standards, reflecting our unwavering commitment towards customers, partners, and the environment.

With the ISO 9001 certification, we assure you of our commitment to consistently deliver products and services that meet and exceed your expectations.

The ISO 14001 certification underscores our responsibility towards environmental sustainability.

We want to extend our heartfelt gratitude to all our customers and partners for their unwavering support and trust in us. Your feedback and encouragement continue to inspire us to raise the bar higher and strive for excellence in everything we do.

NEWS

OCCUPATIONAL, HEALTH AND SAFETY (OHS) POLICY

2 min read | 16 November 2023

We atANAND ENGINEERS PVT LTD, Our company aim is to provide safe and healthy work environment for its employees, workers, customers and interested parties by a comprehensive ofISO 45001-2018OHS standard. We believe that all work-related injuries are preventable and are committed to manage our activities so as, to avoid unnecessary or unaccepted risk to the health and safety of our employees and interested parties.

We are committed to demonstrate continual improvement in OHS performance. To achieve this, we commit ourselves and dedicated to ensuring:-

Comply with all applicable OHS legislation and other requirements to which we subscribe.

Adequate control of the health and safety risks arising from our work activities;

Consultation and active participation of all employees on matters to achieving their health and safety goals;

The provision and maintenance of safe plant and equipment;

The safe handling and use of substances;

Provision of information, instruction and supervision for employees;

That all employees are competent to do their tasks and to give them adequate training;

Prevention of accidents and cases of work-related ill health;

That clear health and safety improvement objectives are set and monitored on a regular basis.

That this policy is implemented, managed, monitored and update as necessary on a regular basis by OHS&E team.

We shall communicate the policy to all our employees and to interested parties on demand.

2 min read | 16 November 2023

We atANAND ENGINEERS PVT LTD, understand that our activities have an impact on the environment and are committed to continual improvement of our environmental performance to meet the requirements ofISO 14001:2015environmental standard. We are committed to demonstrate continual improvement in environmental performance and pollution prevention. To achieve this, we commit ourselves to:

We will minimize our adverse environmental impacts by:

Ensuring compliance with all relevant legislation and obligations associated with our activities.

Managing waste through reduction, re-use, and the promotion of recycling.

Minimizing energy and water consumption.

Promoting sustainable transport initiatives.

Reducing our contribution to global climate change by making year on year reductions in our greenhouse gas emissions.

Promoting and increasing biodiversity conservation and improvement across the factory.

Embedding sustainability within the procurement procedures.

Undertaking to prevent the pollution of the natural environment.

Raising environmental awareness and Sustainable Development Goals amongst staff and workers through improved communication and involvement.

Embedding sustainable development and awareness of environmental issues in our company.

Establishing environmental objectives and targets and reporting progress on an annual basis.

That this policy is implemented, managed, monitored and update as necessary on a regular basis by OHS&E team.

We shall communicate the policy to all our employees and to interested parties on demand.

NEWS

Molygraph Lubricants Celebrates International Yoga Day with Ergonomic Training Session

2 min read | 21 June 2024

[Mumbai, India - 21st June 2024] – In celebration of International Yoga Day on Friday, 21st June 2024, Molygraph Lubricants hosted a special session at their office conducted by a certified Physiotherapist. The event aimed to promote health and wellness among employees, focusing on practical exercises and techniques to improve workplace ergonomics.

The one-hour session featured:

Practical Workstation Stretching Exercises: Employees engaged in guided stretching exercises designed to relieve tension and improve flexibility.

Discussion on Workstation Modifications and Behavior: The session briefly discussed effective workstation setups and ergonomic behaviors that can help prevent strain and injury.

Posture Correction Techniques and Exercises: Attendees were introduced to posture correction techniques and exercises aimed at alleviating common issues such as back pain and neck strain. These exercises are designed to encourage better alignment and reduce the risk of musculoskeletal problems.

Employees shared positive feedback about the event, and many participants noted the immediate benefits of the yoga session and expressed interest in continuing their practice.

The session underscored Molygraph Lubricants' commitment to employee health and wellness, emphasizing the importance of integrating ergonomic practices into daily routines. By celebrating International Yoga Day with such initiatives, Molygraph continues to promote a supportive and health-conscious work environment.

Molygraph Lubricants Showcased Innovative Solutions at INTEC 2024

1 min read | 12 June 2024

Molygraph Lubricants participated in the 20th edition of INTEC, the International Machine Tools & Industrial Trade Fair, which took place from June 6-10, 2024, at the Codissia Trade Fair Complex in Coimbatore.

As a leading innovator in the lubricant industry, Molygraph Lubricants showcased its advanced range of Metal Working Fluids at INTEC 2024. This biennial event, known for its extensive display of industrial machinery and cutting-edge technologies, provided an excellent platform to connect with industry professionals and demonstrate the superior performance and efficiency of their products.

Highlights at the Stall:

SmoothKut Series: Visitors discovered the range of soluble, semi-synthetic, and synthetic cutting fluids designed for various machining operations.

SmoothForm Series: Attendees explored the forming fluids available in diverse water-borne and oil-based chemistries, ideal for metal-forming applications.

Demonstrations: Guests experienced the performance of the products through interactive demonstrations.

Expert Consultations: Experts were available to discuss specific needs and find customized solutions.

For more information on product offerings, check -https://www.molygraph.com/industries/metal-cutting-and-forming

NEWS

Molygraph Lubricants Celebrates World Environment Day with Commitment to Sustainability

3 min read | 05 June 2024

[Mumbai, India - 05.06.2024] – Molygraph Lubricants, a leader in the innovation, formulation, and manufacturer of super specialty lubricants, proudly celebrates ‘World Environment Day’ by reaffirming its commitment to environmental management and sustainable practices. This year's theme, "Ecosystem Restoration," resonates deeply with their mission to create a greener and more sustainable future.

They have recently installed new solar panels at their manufacturing plant. With the addition of a 100 KW system to their existing 48 KW setup, they are able to generate a total of 148 KW of clean, renewable energy. This initiative contributes to 30% energy savings, significantly reducing the carbon footprint.

Molygraph has actively participated in increasing the greenery within the plant premises. Employees enthusiastically planted trees, contributing to local biodiversity and improving air quality. In addition to tree planting, employees took the initiative to clean the surroundings of the manufacturing facility, ensuring a cleaner and healthier environment.

They hand over hazardous waste to Common Hazardous Waste Transportation, Storage, and Disposal Facilities (CHWTSDF) for safe and responsible disposal. Also, they promote recycling by reusing cleaned MS drums in the in-house production processes and have implemented measures to reduce paper consumption by double-sided printing.

The company strictly follows the rule of ‘No plastic bottles’ on the premises. Also, they have taken significant steps to reduce domestic water consumption at the plant by installing self-closing water push taps. Additionally, as a part of their ongoing efforts to reduce energy consumption, they have replaced high-voltage tube lights with energy-efficient LED lighting.

An interesting activity was organized named 'Best from Waste,' where employees were encouraged to create something useful out of waste materials. This activity not only highlighted the importance of recycling but also showcased the creativity and commitment of the team towards sustainable practices.

"At Molygraph, we believe sustainable practices are not just an obligation but a responsibility towards future generations. Our efforts in implementing renewable energy solutions, efficient waste management, and resource conservation reflect our commitment to a greener planet. Our dedication to sustainability drives us to continuously improve our processes and products, ensuring we add value to our customers' operations while protecting the planet." said Mr. Samarth Shah, Director, of Molygraph Lubricants.

NEWS

Molygraph Sales Meet 2025: Celebrating Unity, Strategy & Growth

2 min read | 09 May 2025

Mussoorie, India – [12.04.2025]–Molygraph, a pioneer in specialty lubricants, successfully hosted its annualSales Meet 2025in the serene hills of Mussoorie. This vibrant three-day event brought together the pan-India sales and leadership teams to celebrate milestones, align strategic goals, and strengthen internal collaboration.

Held amidst the tranquil surroundings of Mussoorie, the event was a perfect blend of business insights, team bonding, and cultural appreciation. The Sales Meet emphasized Molygraph’s vision for the future, focusing on customer-centric innovation, expansion into emerging markets, and reinforcing its leadership position in the lubrication industry.

The event kicked off with acultural showcasewhere teams celebrated the rich diversity of India through traditional attire and performances, fostering a deep sense of unity. Day two was dedicated tostrategic planning, recognizing top-performing team members, and reflecting on impactful client success stories. The final day witnessedteam-building activitiesdesigned to reinforce camaraderie and shared purpose beyond the boardroom.

“Our Sales Meet 2025 was more than just a meeting – it was a celebration of our journey, a recognition of our people, and a reaffirmation of our goals. The energy, dedication, and collective vision we witnessed here will power Molygraph through another year of growth and excellence,” saidAjay Shah, Director – Molygraph Lubricants.

Stay connected with us for more updates on our journey and innovations through ourLinkedIn page.

NEWS

Molygraph Showcased Advanced Lubrication Solutions at DMTX 2025

2 min read | 28 July 2025

Delhi, India – [12.05.2025] -Molygraph Lubricants successfully participated inDelhi Machine Tool Expo (DMTX) 2025, one of India’s most prominent exhibitions for the metalworking and machining industries. The event took place atBharat Mandapam Convention Centre, New Delhi,and brought together leading manufacturers, industry professionals, and technology innovators.

At the expo, Molygraph presented itscutting-edge lubrication technologiestailored for metal cutting, forming, and machining operations. Key highlights included:

Latest in Metalworking Fluids & Specialty Lubricants.

Customized Solutions for Cutting, Forming & Machining.

Product Demos & Expert Guidance.

Application Support & Industry Insights.

“Events like DMTX give us the opportunity to connect directly with manufacturers and machine operators. Our goal is not just to sell a product, but to partner with them in improving tool life, surface finish, and operational consistency. We were thrilled by the response and conversations we had at the booth,” saidSiddharth Shah, Director - Molygraph Lubricants.

The Molygraph team engaged with a wide spectrum of visitors, offering customized lubrication recommendations and sharing real-world success stories from the field. The participation reaffirmed Molygraph’s commitment to driving efficiency, tool life, and reliability in the manufacturing sector.

For more updates on how Molygraph is supporting industrial excellence through lubrication, follow us onLinkedIn.

NEWS

Molygraph Lubricants Wins Prestigious ‘TIMES NOW Sustainable Organization’ Award 2024

1 min read | 05 July 2024

Mumbai, India - July 5, 2024 - Molygraph Lubricants, a leading name in the specialty lubricants industry, proudly announces its recognition as the TIMES NOW Sustainable Organization 2024. This prestigious award celebrates Molygraph's commitment to sustainability, innovation, and excellence in business practices.

Ajay Shah, Executive Director of Molygraph Lubricants, expressed his gratitude for the honor, stating, "We are incredibly proud to receive the TIMES NOW Sustainable Organization Award 2024. This recognition is evidence of our relentless pursuit of sustainable solutions and our dedication to creating a positive impact on the environment and the communities we serve."

The company's robust R&D capabilities have enabled the creation of high-performance, environmentally responsible products that reduce carbon footprints and enhance operational efficiency for its customers.

The TIMES NOW Sustainable Organization Award is presented to companies that demonstrate exceptional leadership in environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and corporate governance. Molygraph's success is driven by a team of dedicated professionals who are passionate about making a difference.

"This award reinforces our mission to provide innovative lubrication solutions that contribute to a greener future," added Mr. Ajay Shah. "We remain committed to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in our industry and setting new standards."

pages.text:
NEWS

Molygraph Reinforced Its Expertise in Sugar Mill Lubrication at 83rd STAI Convention & Sugar Expo 2025

2 min read | 12 August 2025

Delhi, India – [26.07.2025] -Molygraph Lubricants proudly participated in the83rd STAI Annual Convention & International Sugar Expo 2025, held atBharat Mandapam Convention Centre, New Delhi, from24th to 26th July. The event attracted top professionals and decision-makers from the sugar industry across India and beyond.

AtStall 32 & 33, Molygraph showcased itsend-to-end lubrication solutions tailored for the sugar industry, addressing the unique challenges of crusher bearings, open gears, conveyors, and other plant components.

Featured solutions included:

SMG Premium– A heavy-duty, water-resistant grease designed for high-load crusher bearings.

OGG 2500– A solid lubricant-based grease formulated for large open gear systems.

BRB 30– Versatile greases suited for general mill equipment and auxiliary machinery.

The event provided an excellent platform to interact with engineers, heads, and decision-makers. Molygraph’s team shared insights into extending bearing life, reducing grease consumption, and lowering total cost of ownership.

“Our aim at the Sugar Expo was to demonstrate how specialized lubrication can directly influence operational uptime, maintenance cycles, and energy efficiency in sugar mills. The response we received was overwhelmingly positive, with many plant heads interested in our case studies and field-proven results,” saidAmit Kabra, Sr. Area Sales Manager, Molygraph Lubricants.

pages.text:
NEWS

Molygraph Showcases Cutting-Edge Lubrication Solutions at IMTEX 2025

2 min read | 11 Feb 2025

Bangalore, India – 29.01.2025 – Molygraph, a leader in high-performance specialty lubricants, made a remarkable impact at IMTEX 2025, South Asia’s premier exhibition for the metal-cutting and manufacturing industries. With a dedicated stall at the event, Molygraph demonstrated its latest innovations, highlighting its commitment to enhancing industrial efficiency, performance, and sustainability.

IMTEX 2025, organized by the Indian Machine Tool Manufacturers' Association (IMTMA), was held at the Bangalore International Exhibition Centre (BIEC), attracting global industry leaders, manufacturers, and experts. Molygraph’s presence at the event reinforced its position as a trusted lubrication partner for industries seeking cutting-edge solutions to optimize equipment performance and longevity.

At Stall No. B121, Hall No 7, Molygraph presented a comprehensive range of high-performance lubricants, metal-forming fluids, and industrial oils, catering to the evolving demands of the metalworking and manufacturing sectors. Visitors engaged with Molygraph’s team to explore solutions tailored for machining, stamping, forging, and precision engineering applications.

Molygraph’s participation at IMTEX 2025 was not just about showcasing products—it was about making strong industry connections and sharing knowledge. The company’s technical experts and business leaders engaged in insightful discussions with manufacturers, engineers, and industrial decision-makers, addressing challenges related to lubrication, wear protection, and operational efficiency.

“With manufacturing industries evolving rapidly, precision, efficiency, and sustainability are key. Our presence at IMTEX 2025 reaffirmed Molygraph’s role as an innovation-driven brand committed to offering reliable, high-performance lubrication solutions that meet modern industry challenges,” said S. Natheem, National Sales Manager - MWF, Molygraph Lubricants.

For more details about our offerings and regular updates, follow us onLinkedIn.

pages.text:
NEWS

Molygraph Participates in Poultry Expo 2025, Showcasing Advanced Lubrication Solutions for the Animal Feed Industry

2 min read | 02 December 2025

Hyderabad, India [28.11.2025]— Molygraph Lubricants proudly marked its presence atPoultry Expo 2025, one of India’s leading exhibitions for the poultry, feed, and livestock sectors. With a strong focus on innovation, reliability, and industry-specific lubrication solutions, Molygraph’s participation reinforced its commitment to supporting the evolving needs of the poultry industry.

Held at theHITEX Exhibition Centre, the event brought together manufacturers, technology providers, integrators, and industry experts from across the country. Molygraph’s dedicated team engaged with visitors, showcased high-performance products, and highlighted the importance of lubrication in maintaining operational efficiency for poultry farms and feed mills.

At the expo, Molygraph presented its specialised solutions engineered to address critical challenges in poultry and feed machinery, including:

High-temperature and water-resistant greases for continuous processing equipment

Food-grade NSF-certified lubricants for safe and compliant operations

Long-life greases that reduce downtime and extend equipment life

High-performance chain oils designed for extreme humidity and dust conditions.

Visitors were introduced to Molygraph’sSAFOLfood-grade range, formulated to ensure safety, compliance, and superior lubrication for machinery used in feed manufacturing, hatcheries, and poultry processing plants.

“Molygraph’s participation at Poultry Expo 2025 reflects its ongoing mission to partner with industries requiring reliable, safe, and performance-driven lubrication solutions. The event served as an impactful platform for relationship-building, knowledge sharing, and demonstrating Molygraph’s expertise in solving complex lubrication challenges,” said Mr Feroz Sayyed, Vice President - Sales & Technical Services.

pages.text:
NEWS

Driving Innovation, Comfort, and Collaboration in the Automotive Industry

2 min read | 13 October 2025

Pune, India – [09.10.2025] -We atMolygraph Lubricantsare proud to share the success of ourAutomotive Tech Day 2025, held recently. The event brought together some of the brightest minds and leading professionals from the automotive industry — including OEMs, Tier-1 suppliers, and technology partners — to exchange insights, explore innovations, and strengthen collaborations.

The event opened with sessions onAutomotive lubrication basics,R&D updates, andNVH and damping innovationsshaping the future of mobility. TheVoice of Customersegment showcased real-world success on Series parts, reinforcing our belief in building lasting relationships based on trust and performance.

Adding a touch of fun and engagement, Q&A and open session kept the energy high, while the evening concluded with meaningful networking over dinner.

Sharing his thoughts on the event,Mr. Paramjeet Singh Karir, Head of OEM & Strategic Business at Molygraph Lubricants, said:

“Automotive Tech Day 2025 was more than an event — it was a celebration of collaboration and innovation. As vehicles become quieter, smarter, and more sustainable, our lubrication technologies play an integral role in enhancing performance, safety, and comfort. We’re proud to partner with the automotive industry in this exciting journey forward.”

We sincerely thank all our guests, partners, and media representatives who joined us and made this event memorable.

pages.text:
NEWS

Molygraph Concludes Successful Participation at ANUGA Food Tec India 2024,Showcasing Advanced Food-Grade Lubricants

2 min read | 16 September 2024

Mumbai, India - 31 August 2024 - Molygraph, a leader in high-performance specialty lubricants, successfully participated inANUGA Food Tec India 2024, held fromAugust 28th to 30th, 2024, at theBombay Exhibition Centre, Mumbai. The prestigious event, known as one of the leading international trade fairs for food and beverage technology, provided a valuable platform for Molygraph to showcase its innovative range of food-grade lubricants, specifically designed for demanding industrial applications in the food processing sector.

DuringANUGA Food Tec India 2024, Molygraph presented itsNSF-certified, HALAL, and KOSHER food-grade lubricants, which are designed to ensure machinery efficiency, safety, and compliance with strict food industry standards. The company’s solutions demonstrated how these advanced lubricants extend machinery life, reduce maintenance costs, and support sustainability initiatives in the food manufacturing process.

SAFOL is a comprehensive range of products from Molygraph Lubricants for the food, pharma, and beverage industries. TheSAFOLrange offers exceptional performance under high-temperature, high-pressure conditions while ensuring safety in food contact areas. These lubricants are engineered to minimize contamination risks, making them ideal for mixers, conveyors, and other food processing machinery.

Visitors to Molygraph’s booth had the opportunity to explore solutions customized for critical applications. "As the food industry continues to evolve with increasing demands for hygiene, safety, and sustainability, Molygraph remains committed to delivering innovative lubrication technologies. Our presence atANUGA Food Tec India 2024allowed us to connect with industry leaders and demonstrate our dedication to enhancing productivity and safeguarding food processing equipment," said Samarth Shah, Director of Molygraph Lubricants.

Share

pages.text:
NEWS

Lubrication Excellence on Display: Molygraph at India Steel 2025

2 min read | 12 May 2025

Mumbai, India – [26.04.2025]–Molygraph, a trusted name in high-performance specialty lubricants, made a powerful impression atIndia Steel 2025, held at theBombay Exhibition Centre (BEC), Mumbai. As one of the key players in lubrication solutions for the steel industry, Molygraph showcased its advanced product range tailored for critical steel manufacturing processes.

AtStall No. D101, Hall No. 5, Molygraph presented cutting-edge technologies designed to tackle high-temperature, high-load, and corrosive environments typically found in steel plants. The product line includedspecialty greases for continuous casting, high-temperature chain oils, rust preventives, and MRO solutionsthat improve reliability, reduce downtime, and extend equipment life.

India Steel 2025 brought together leading manufacturers, engineers, and decision-makers from the steel industry, providing the ideal platform for technical discussions, partnership opportunities, and solution sharing. Molygraph’s technical experts were actively engaged with visitors, offering customized solutions based on real-time operational challenges.

“Our participation in India Steel 2025 reaffirmed our focus on industry-specific innovation and strong customer collaboration. With deep application knowledge and a problem-solving mindset, we aim to be the lubrication partner of choice for the steel sector,” saidSamarth Shah, Director - Molygraph Lubricants.

For more updates on how Molygraph is supporting industrial excellence through lubrication, follow us onLinkedIn.

NEWS

Molygraph Lubricants Showcases Advanced Industrial Lubrication Solutions at Lubricant Expo Dubai

2 min read | 18 Feb 2026

Dubai, UAE – [22.01.2026]– Molygraph Lubricants, a leading manufacturer of specialty industrial lubricants, proudly participated in Lubricant Expo Dubai, one of the region’s premier platforms for the global lubricants, base oils, and additive industry.

The event brought together key stakeholders from across the lubricant value chain, including base oil producers, additive manufacturers, formulators, OEMs, distributors, and end-user industries, creating a dynamic environment for knowledge exchange and business collaboration.

At the expo, Molygraph highlighted its comprehensive portfolio of high-performance industrial lubricants designed to enhance equipment reliability, reduce downtime, and improve operational efficiency across industries such as cement, steel, mining, power, automotive manufacturing, oil & gas, and general engineering.

Visitors to the Molygraph booth engaged in insightful discussions around:

Advanced lubrication strategies for heavy-duty industrial applications

Energy-efficient and sustainable lubrication solutions

Customized lubrication programs tailored to demanding operating conditions

Expanding distribution partnerships across international markets

Speaking about the participation,Samarth Shah, Director – Marketing & International Business, Molygraph Lubricants,said, “Lubricant Expo Dubai provides a valuable global platform to exchange ideas, explore emerging trends, and strengthen partnerships across markets. As industries evolve toward greater efficiency and sustainability, we believe innovation in lubrication technology plays a critical role in driving performance and long-term value.”

With a growing international presence across Asia Pacific, the Middle East, and other key markets, Molygraph continues to focus on expanding its global footprint through strong channel partnerships, technical collaboration, and application-driven solutions.

For more information, please check -https://www.molygraph.com/industries

pages.text:
NEWS

Molygraph Lubricants Showcased Advanced Solutions for Construction & Mining at EXCON 2025

2 min read | 15 December 2025

Bengaluru, India [09.12.2025]— Molygraph Lubricants, a leading manufacturer of high-performance industrial lubricants,participated in EXCON 2025, South Asia’s largest construction equipment and technology exhibition, held at theBangalore International Exhibition Centre (BIEC), Bengaluru, from9th to 13th December 2025.

At the exhibition, Molygraphshowcased its advanced lubrication solutions engineered for construction, mining, and heavy-duty equipment applications, sectors that operate under extreme loads, high temperatures, dust, moisture, and continuous operating conditions.

Visitors at the Molygraph stall explored a comprehensive range ofhigh-performance greases, oils, and specialty lubrication solutionsdesigned to enhance equipment reliability, reduce downtime, and extend component life in critical applications such as excavators, crushers, loaders, dumpers, conveyors, and mining machinery.“EXCON served as a valuable platform to engage with OEMs, contractors, fleet owners, and maintenance professionals from the construction and mining sectors. The exhibition allowed us to demonstrate how the right lubrication strategy can significantly improve equipment uptime and operational efficiency in harsh operating environments,”saidMr. Feroz Sayyed, VP - Sales & Technical Services.

Throughout the five-day exhibition, the Molygraph teamengaged with industry professionals through live product demonstrations, technical discussions, and an interactive quiz. Molygraph’s participation at EXCON reinforced its commitment to supporting India’s infrastructure and mining sectors by delivering reliable, high-performance lubrication technologies aligned with global standards and local operating requirements.

pages.text:
NEWS

Molygraph Lubricants Showcases Cutting-Edge Solutions at Bauma ConExpo 2024

1 min read | 31 December 2024

New Delhi, India - December 15th, 2024 - Molygraph Lubricants, a leading innovator, proudly announces its successful participation in Bauma ConExpo 2024, the premier trade fair for construction machinery, building material machines, mining machines, and construction vehicles. Held from 11-14 December at India Expo Centre in New Delhi, India, the event brought together industry leaders, innovators, and experts from around the globe. Bauma ConExpo is a globally recognized event that attracts thousands of professionals and businesses, offering insights into the latest trends, technologies, and advancements in the construction and mining industries.

At Bauma ConExpo, Molygraph showcased its latest products and technologies designed to enhance efficiency, durability, and sustainability in the construction and mining industries. Visitors to the booth experienced firsthand how our solutions address some of the most pressing challenges in the industry.

“Bauma ConExpo is the platform to connect with industry stakeholders, showcase our innovations, and understand the evolving needs of our customers,” said Mr. Siddharth Shah, Director of Sales. “We are proud to contribute to shaping the future of the construction and mining sectors through our sustainable and high-performance solutions.”

Share

New Delhi, India - December 15th, 2024 - Molygraph Lubricants, a leading innovator, proudly announces its successful participation in Bauma ConExpo 2024, the premier trade fair for construction machinery, building material machines, mining machines, and construction vehicles. Held from 11-14 December at India Expo Centre in New Delhi, India, the event brought together industry leaders, innovators, and experts from around the globe. Bauma ConExpo is a globally recognized event that attracts thousands of professionals and businesses, offering insights into the latest trends, technologies, and advancements in the construction and mining industries.

At Bauma ConExpo, Molygraph showcased its latest products and technologies designed to enhance efficiency, durability, and sustainability in the construction and mining industries. Visitors to the booth experienced firsthand how our solutions address some of the most pressing challenges in the industry.

“Bauma ConExpo is the platform to connect with industry stakeholders, showcase our innovations, and understand the evolving needs of our customers,” said Mr. Siddharth Shah, Director of Sales. “We are proud to contribute to shaping the future of the construction and mining sectors through our sustainable and high-performance solutions.”

Share
